meanings.definition: making great mental demands; hard to comprehend or solve or believe
examples: I faced the knotty problem of what to have for breakfast

meanings.definition: used of old persons or old trees; covered with knobs or knots
highly complex or intricate and occasionally devious; ; ; ; ; ; ; ; - Sir Walter Scott
examples: Byzantine methods for holding on to his chairmanship
got his way by labyrinthine maneuvering
Oh, what a tangled web we weave
